description: Difficulty scaling — resistance penalties, experience modifiers per difficulty.

UberCodeOddsNormal.description: Percentage chance of dropping exceptional (uber) items on normal monsters

UberCodeOddsGood.description: Percentage chance of dropping exceptional (uber) items on champion/unique monsters

MonsterFreezeDivisor.description: Divisor reducing freeze duration on monsters in this difficulty

MonsterColdDivisor.description: Divisor reducing cold effect duration on monsters in this difficulty

AiCurseDivisor.description: Divisor reducing curse duration on monsters in this difficulty
